title: OSM Notes batch generator from authorized sources (human-posted)
context: OSM Notes are a lightweight contribution channel that lets anyone flag a location for mappers to investigate, without requiring a full editor session. This generator produces a batch of draft OSM Notes from a reviewed candidate-feature dataset, for a human to post via the standard OSM Notes interface. The generator must pass through the do-no-harm filter and must never autonomously POST notes via the OSM API — it outputs a file or UI-pasteable text for a human to post. Note text must not include people-level data.
objective: Build and ship a read-only OSM Notes batch generator that produces human-postable draft notes from a reviewed candidate-feature dataset, filtered through the do-no-harm gate.
acceptanceCriteria: Generator produces well-formed OSM Note draft text (location + description) from a reviewed candidate-feature dataset (candidates-009 format).
Generator does not autonomously POST to the OSM Notes API; it outputs drafts for a human to post.
Note text passes through the do-no-harm filter: no people-level data, no sensitive feature descriptions that could cause harm.
Ships committed golden fixtures (candidate input → expected note text); pnpm build && pnpm test && pnpm lint passes green.
Code is licensed MIT; commits are DCO signed-off.
Reviewed by the technical reviewer and do-no-harm reviewer.
resources: PLAN.md — Machine-readable outputs for human mappers section
output: A merged PR containing the OSM Notes batch generator (TypeScript/ESM), golden fixtures, passing CI, with do-no-harm filtering and no autonomous API posting.
